name: Hirilun
short_description: Hirilun is a fast-paced first-person platformer set in a dark, strange city. Run, jump, glide, sprint and dash to achieve the best time and compete on global leaderboards. Can you beat your friends in these intense time trials?
detailed_description:
Welcome to Hirilun, the city of shadows where only the fleet of foot can rise to fame. Here, you'll navigate through a labyrinth of hidden alleys and towering skyscrapers, racing against the clock to reach your goal. Every level presents a new challenge with multiple paths to choose from, so it's up to you to decide which route is the fastest.

But beware, as you'll need to use all your skills to stay ahead of the competition. Dash, sprint, and glide through the city, but use these abilities wisely, as they are limited. And watch out for the mysterious power-ups scattered throughout the city – they may just give you the boost you need to set a new record.

Compete with your friends and see who can conquer Hirilun's leaderboards, updated daily. Are you ready to become the ultimate speedster of the city?

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, French, German, Russian, Simplified Chinese
